name: recordstore
purpose: Typed, queryable project records that prose memory can't hold: decisions (context/choice/status), measurements (a metric over time), and outcome events - in a project-local SQLite store with add/query/timeline. A COMPLEMENT to native memory, not a replacement.
reach_for_me_when: you need to query decisions later ('all accepted API decisions since March'), not just recall prose
you are tracking a metric over time and want the series, not a vibe
you want outcome events recorded in a structured store (feeds the ledger)

commands.name: add
commands.summary: Add a typed record: decision | measurement | event
